provenance.prompt: oil painting, semi-realistic painterly character concept art, muted dusty palette, subtle dark edges, soft upper-left directional lighting, worn and functional aesthetic, lived-in sci-fi, visible material texture and surface grain, visible brushstrokes, full body visible, front-facing standing pose, isolated on plain dark grey background, human male wearing an old west cowboy outfit in space — leather chaps over jeans, a Stetson hat, a plaid western shirt, cowboy boots with spurs, a revolver in a hip holster, a lasso on the belt, he looks like someone cosplaying a cowboy at a science fiction convention, this is not lived-in sci-fi this is a genre costume
provenance.negative_prompt: photorealistic, photograph, photo, stock photo, 3d render, smooth CG, CGI, octane render, unreal engine, anime, cartoon, chibi, bright saturated colors, clean pristine new clothing, glamorous, heroic pose, dynamic action pose, multiple characters, busy background, environmental background, landscape, text, watermark, blurry, low quality, extra limbs, deformed, medieval, fantasy, superhero, symmetrical matching armor

judgment.explanation: Old west cowboy outfit in space — chaps, Stetson, plaid shirt, spurs. Genre costume at a sci-fi convention, not lived-in sci-fi. Violates CLO-003.
